title: SOUND THE ALARM - 211info
text: NORTHWEST OREGON CHAPTER SOUND THE ALARM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education on home fire safety and the installation of fire alarms. A trained Red Cross volunteer will install a smoke alarm in the house, review a fire safety and home hazard checklist, and provide information about creating a fire escape plan. Also offers specialized bedside alarms for individuals who are deaf or hard-of-hearing. 3131 N Vancouver Avenue Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 528-5783 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 528-5783 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Clackamas, Clatsop, Columbia, Coos, Crook, Curry, Deschutes, Douglas, Gilliam, Grant, Harney, Hood River, Jackson, Jefferson, Josephine, Klamath, Lake, Lane, Lincoln, Linn, Marion, Morrow, Multnomah, Polk, Sherman, Tillamook, Umatilla, Wasco, Washington, Wheeler, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Fire Prevention Information Smoke Alarms Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - RED CROSS DISASTER SERVICES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DNA/RELATIONSHIP TESTING SERVICES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH AND SAFETY COURSES MILITARY SERVICE - RED CROSS MILITARY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
